- [What Is Brand Positioning and Why Indian Startups Get It Wrong](https://boostronixx.test/blog/what-is-brand-positioning/): Brand positioning is the space your brand owns in a customer's mind — and most Indian startups get it wrong\. Here are the 5 costliest mistakes and a 5\-step framework to fix them\.
